  • Flat Apartment for rent in Ikoyi

Newly Furnished 3 Bedroom Luxury Apartment

1/50
×
  • Must See

₦ 75,000,000/year

  • 3 Beds
  • 3 Baths
  • 4 Toilets

Contact Agent

080591*** Whatsapp

Property address

​PID: 7NUGY

Old Ikoyi Ikoyi Lagos

Last updated 2026-03-13 14:02:45.0
View similar properties nearby

Safety Tips

  • Do not make any inspection fee without seeing the agent and property.
  • Only pay Rental fee, Sales fee or any upfront payment after you verify the Landlord.
  • Ensure you meet the Agent in an open location.
  • The Agent does not represent PropertyPro and PropertyPro is not liable for any monetary transaction between you and the Agent.

Safety Tips

  • Do not make any inspection fee without seeing the agent and property.
  • Only pay Rental fee, Sales fee or any upfront payment after you verify the Landlord.
  • Ensure you meet the Agent in an open location.
  • The Agent does not represent PropertyPro and PropertyPro is not liable for any monetary transaction between you and the Agent.
See full less tips

Description

Newly furnished 3 Bedroom Apartment in a premium-class Residential Court with a single block of Twelve (12) apartments located at Old Ikoyi, Ikoyi, Lagos.


ACCOMMODATION DETAILS:
Opulent Living Area (with balcony); Ample designated Dining Area (with balcony); Guest Toilet; Ample Kitchen; Spacious Pantry; Spacious Laundry Room; Lobby; Spacious 1st Bedroom (ensuite) with balcony; Spacious 2nd Bedroom (ensuite) with balcony; Opulent Master Bedroom (en-suite) with balcony.


FEATURES INCLUDE:
Premium furniture (yet to arrive); Premium quality Kitchen; FULLY fitted Kitchen; Premium quality wardrobes; Premium quality Sanitary Wares and Bathrooms; Premium quality fixtures and fittings; 1-Room Steward Quarters; etc.


FACILITIES/AMENITIES:
Generous and fully Air Conditioned Stairway; Generous common lobby; Air Conditioners in all Rooms and Kitchen; 24-Hour Power Supply; 24-Hour Corporate Security Personnel; Elevator; Swimming Pool with ample deck and relaxation amenities; Fully Equipped Gym; Children Play Area; Outdoor Bar/Lounge; Dedicated Transformer; Intercom Communication System; CCTV Security Check System; Smoke Detection and Fire Prevention System; Water Heaters; Central Water Treatment Plant; 2-Car Parking Lot; Cleaning Services; Waste and Sewage Disposal; etc.


Rent is NGN75,000,000 (SEVENTY FIVE MILLION NAIRA ONLY) per annum, only.
Service Charge is NGN4M per annum.
Power/Diesel Deposit is NGN6M per annum.
Refundable Security Deposit is NGN5M.
Agency Fee and Legal Fee applies.


ALL PRICING ARE AS AT NOVEMBER 11, 2025 AND SUBJECT TO ADJUSTMENT.



KINDLY NOTE:
(1) All enquiries could be made between 8:00am – 7:00pm (Monday – Friday) and between 8:00am – 2:00pm (Saturdays);
(2) Our offices (including phone-lines) are closed on Sundays;
(3) Viewing/inspection is only by appointment;
(4) We require 2-Hour (minimum) advance notice for property viewing/inspection;
(5) You can also reach us via these channels: [redacted]; +234(0)[redacted]; +234(0)[redacted].

Best Regards.
